results.user_request: what's the difference between machine learning and ai
results.response_text: I think machine learning is a subset of AI. Machine learning involves teaching computers to learn from data and improve over time, while AI refers to the broader goal of creating systems that can perform tasks that typically require human intelligence. So, machine learning is one way to achieve artificial intelligence.
